name: Folk
description: Find the Evil and Fei that hide beside you and eliminate them trough discussion and voting.
winCondition: You win when no Evil nor Fei remain.

name: Hero
description: The heroes of this story you must work together to vanquish threats to Olympia.
winCondition: You win when there are no Monsters or Corrupted left alive.

name: Town
description: Identify and eliminate the hidden Werewolves through discussion and voting.
winCondition: You win when there are no Werewolves, Vampires or Evils left alive.

name: Village
description: Identify and eliminate the hidden Vampires through discussion and voting.
winCondition: You win when there are no Werewolves, Vampires or Evils left alive.

name: Fei
description: Hide in plain side and take Folk at night.
winCondition: You win when Fei equal or outnumber Folk and no Evils are left alive.

name: Monster
description: Beasts of all kinds, you dont need a reason to want others dead.
winCondition: You win when Monsters equal or outnumber other players, and there are no Corrupted left alive.

name: Vampire
description: Secretly eliminate villagers each night and try to blend in during the day.
winCondition: You win when Vampires equal or outnumber other players, and there are no Evils left alive.

name: Werewolf
description: Secretly eliminate villagers each night and try to blend in during the day.
winCondition: You win when Werewolves equal or outnumber other players, and there are no Evils left alive.

name: Neutral
description: See to your own unique objectives or win condition, independent of other factions.
winCondition: You win if you survive until the end of the game.

name: Neutral
description: See to your own unique objectives or win conditions, independent of other factions.
winCondition: You win if you survive to the end of the game or your objectives are fulfilled.

name: Corrupted
description: Corrupted by Evil forces you will do whatever it takes to prevail over Olympia.
winCondition: You win when there are 3 or less players alive, regardless of their factions.

name: Evil
description: Oppose the Town and Werewolves, creating a complex dynamic of competing factions.
winCondition: You win when there are 3 or less players alive, regardless of their factions.

name: Evil
description: Oppose the Folk and Fei, creating a complex dynamic of competing factions.
winCondition: You win when there are 3 or less players alive and no Fei remain. Some Evil might pursue other goals.

name: Lesser Evil
description: Align with both Werewolves and Evils against the Town.
winCondition: You win with either the Werewolves or an Evil.

name: Lesser Evil
description: Align with Evil and Fei against the Folk.
winCondition: You win with either Fei or Evil.

name: Tainted
description: Swayed by evil forces you sabotage the heroes from the shadows.
winCondition: You win if the Heroes lose.
